title: CoinFlip [With GUI]
description: Coinflip plugin featuring an animated GUI, sound effects, and fair 50-50 wins.
body:
Coinflip Plugin – Bet, Flip, Win!
Bring thrilling gambling action to your Minecraft server with the Coinflip Plugin, a fun and fair way for players to risk their money in a simple heads-or-tails style game. Whether you’re running an economy-based SMP or a PvP hub, this plugin adds excitement, sounds, and clean visuals for an unforgettable experience!

Features
Interactive GUI
Players get a beautiful animated GUI showing a coin spinning between two sides (customizable items like gold coin vs creeper head).

Sound Effects & Visual Feedback
Smooth sound effects and particle animations to build tension as the coin flips!

Vault Economy Integration
Full support for any Vault-compatible economy plugin like EssentialsX or EconomyShopGUI.

⚖️ Fair 50-50 Chance System
The outcome is purely random – no rigging! Players either double their money or lose it all..
Player Command:
/coinflip <amount> heads|tails – easy and intuitive for all players!

Permission Support
Give access only to specific groups or players with simple permission nodes.
️ Installation Instructions
Download the Plugin JAR and place it into your server's /plugins/ folder.
Restart or reload your server.
Permissions
coinflip.use – Allows a player to use the /coinflip command.
Final Notes
This plugin is designed to be lag-free, lightweight, and fun for all players. Encourage your community to take risks and win big, or walk away empty-handed. It's a perfect feature for minigame servers, SMPs, or casinos! If you have any problem or changes to make dm me on discord -- "yoferox".
